title: Soo Rcharrz
content:
{{Top|ga|ncl}} {{Otheruses|Soo}} {{Tales1-20}} {{Character |type=Rebel |image=[[File:SooRcharrz.jpg]] |name=Soo Rcharrz |homeworld= |birth= |death=By [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]], [[Vatleria]]Following Rcharrz's [[Mission to Vatleria|death]] in "[[The Rebel Four]]," the [[Star Wars comic books|comic]] ends with the statement that [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] will fulfill his wish for [[Lightsaber combat/Legends|combat]] with a [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] soon, referencing his [[Lightsaber duel/Legends|duel]] with [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] during the [[Rescue of Princess Leia/Legends|Rescue of Princess Leia]] in {{Film|IV}}, which takes place in [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]] according to ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''. Therefore, Rcharrz's death must have occurred by 0 [['ABY-BBY' dating system/Legends|0 BBY]]. |species=[[Humanoid/Legends|Humanoid]]{{Tales|9|The Rebel Four}} |gender= |pronouns= |height= |mass= |hair=[[Color/Legends|Blond]] |feathers= |eyes=Black |skin=White |cyber= |families= |parents= |partners= |siblings= |children= |affiliation=*[[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] **[[Rebel Four]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|What's the plan chief?"
"To stop them, of course.|Soo Rcharrz and F4-MF, before attacking the Imperials on Vatleria|}} '''Soo Rcharrz''' was a [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoid]] member of the "[[Rebel Four]]," a team affiliated with the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]]. They operated alongside the team's leader, [[F4-MF]], and fellow members [[Falaem Onn]] and [[Grimgrim]]. By [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]], the team [[Mission to Vatleria|traveled]] to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Vatleria]] to investigate a lead on an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Stone ruins|base]]. After confirming it, Rcharrz and the team attacked the [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]], but were foiled by traps activated by the [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Sith Lord]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]]. Each member of the team was [[Death/Legends|killed]] in a unique fashion; Rcharrz was disintegrated. ==Biography== {{Quote|The Rebel Four hesitate for nothing! When but a handful of stormtroopers stand between us and victory, all I have to say is… It's Rebellin' time!|F4-MF, to the Rebel Four|}} [[File:Invisible_Woman.png|thumb|right|250px|Soo Rcharrz was disintegrated in Vader's trap.]] Soo Rcharrz was a [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoid]] member of the [[Rebel Four]], a team of freedom fighters affiliated with the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]]. The team was led by the [[IG-series/Legends|IG-series]] [[Droid/Legends|droid]] [[F4-MF]], and also included members [[Falaem Onn]] and [[Grimgrim]]. By [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]], during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] between the Alliance and the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], an [[Unidentified informant|informant]] told the Rebel Four that the Empire was establishing a base within the [[stone ruins]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]]{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}} [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Vatleria]]. The team [[Mission to Vatleria|traveled]] to the ruins, where F4-MF verified the information after sighting Imperial [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]]. Rcharrz asked the droid what their plan was, and F4-MF huddled with the team and announced that they would stop the Imperials, confident that they would be victorious. The Rebel Four charged into battle as F4-MF loudly declared that it was "Rebellin' time." In combat, Rcharrz fired at the stormtroopers with a [[Blaster rifle/Legends|blaster rifle]] alongside F4-MF. The team's attack was interrupted by the [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Sith Lord]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]], who activated [[Rope/Legends|ropes]] that pulled the operatives into [[Death/Legends|death]] chambers that killed each of them in unique ways. Rcharrz was obliterated into nothingness. Vader afterward lamented at how easily the Rebel Four had been defeated. ==Personality and traits== Rcharrz was a brave freedom fighter and answered to F4-MF during the mission to Vatleria. The operative had [[Color/Legends|white]] skin, black [[Eye/Legends|eyes]], and short blond [[Hair/Legends|hair]] that was parted over to their right side. ==Equipment== Rcharrz wielded a blaster rifle in combat. Their outfit consisted of a light blue [[shirt]], a black [[Clothing/Legends|vest]], blue pants, and a black [[Belt/Legends|belt]] and [[Boot/Legends|boots]]. ==Behind the scenes== Soo Rcharrz appeared in "[[The Rebel Four]]," a [[Canon|non-canon]] comic written and illustrated by [[Jay Stephens]] and published in the [[Star Wars Tales 9|ninth issue]] of the anthology series ''[[Star Wars Tales]]'' by [[Dark Horse Comics]] on [[October 10]], [[2001]].{{DarkHorse|url=Comics/00-458/Star-Wars-Tales-9-photo-cover|text=Star Wars Tales 9}} The character's name and fate resemble the [[Marvel Comics]] superhero [[Wikipedia:Invisible Woman|Sue Richards, the Invisible Woman]].{{Marvel|url=characters/invisible-woman/in-comics/profile|text=Invisible Woman}} ==Appearances== {{Mediacat|imagecat=Images of Soo Rcharrz}} *{{Tales|9|The Rebel Four}} {{1st}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Soo Rcharrz }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Rcharrz, Soo}} [[Category:Humanoids]] [[Category:Individuals of unspecified gender]] [[Category:Individuals with unspecified pronouns]] [[Category:Rebel Four members]]
